title: Test Gate Drift
findings: 发现 2 个 test gate drift：CI perf gate 使用 legacy/minimal fixture 可漏掉 mounted-store 冷启动退化；root 暴露的 rc6:gate 已与当前文件/配置漂移，作为 release helper 会产生失真 gate 信号。
issues_found: [{"title":"CI perf benchmark uses a legacy minimal fixture instead of the mounted-store workflow","severity":"medium","description":"The CI perf gate claims to measure interactive `fabric doctor` and SessionStart cold-start latency, but setupCliFixture only creates `.fabric/agents.meta.json` and `.fabric/events.jsonl` in a synthetic temp root. It never creates a current mounted store, store.json, project binding, or resolved-bindings snapshot, so store resolver / read-set / bindings regressions can pass this p95 gate while production-shaped projects slow down.","location":"scripts/perf-benchmark.mjs:54","fix_direction":"Add a second production-shaped benchmark fixture that creates a Fabric home, mounted store with store.json and knowledge entries, project fabric-config binding, and bindings snapshot; gate or at least report p95 for that mounted-store doctor/hook path from CI.","affected_components":["scripts/perf-benchmark.mjs",".github/workflows/ci.yml","fabric doctor cold start","SessionStart hook perf gate","mounted store workflow"],"tags":["test-gate-drift","perf-gate","store-fixture-drift"]},{"title":"Exposed rc6 gate is stale against current hook/config files","severity":"medium","description":"The root package still exposes `pnpm rc6:gate`, but the gate re-runs a stale rc5 anchor and checks current files against outdated assumptions. With build/tests skipped, it fails on rc5 legacy checks, missing Cursor SessionStart/PreToolUse slots, and a deleted `packages/cli/src/commands/hooks.ts` path before it can provide a useful release signal. This makes the named gate misleading and likely to be bypassed rather than trusted.","location":"scripts/rc6-coverage-gate.mjs:439","fix_direction":"Either retire rc5:gate/rc6:gate from package.json, or update rc6 checks to current hook config ownership and command files, then add a lightweight test/CI assertion that exposed gate scripts execute successfully with FABRIC_GATE_SKIP_BUILD=1 and FABRIC_GATE_SKIP_TESTS=1.","affected_components":["package.json rc6:gate","scripts/rc6-coverage-gate.mjs","scripts/rc5-coverage-gate.mjs","hook config release checks"],"tags":["test-gate-drift","release-gate","stale-script"]}]
